channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The rugged Bose Soundlink Flex is 25 percent off right now
item.description: We saw a host of excellent Bose discounts during Amazon’s so-called Big Spring Sale last month; however, none of them were quite as steep as the current price drop we’re seeing on the latest Bose Soundlink Flex. Right now, the portable speaker is on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $119 ($40 off), […]

item.title: Russian government hackers broke into thousands of home routers to steal passwords
item.description: Fancy Bear, also known as APT28, has taken over thousands of residential home routers to steal passwords and authentication tokens in a wide-ranging espionage operation.

item.title: Rise and Shine and Grab the Breakfast Drugs: the ‘Rick and Morty’ Season 9 Trailer Is Here
item.description: The Adult Swim hit returns May 24 for its latest 10-episode season.

item.title: Vertical browser tabs are better and you should use them
item.description: Google's Chrome browser is getting a couple of new features, both of them extremely welcome and wildly overdue. The first is a reading mode, which does what it already does in most other browsers: strip out a lot of website cruft to make pages easier to read. Reading mode is good, you should use it, […]

item.title: Chrome is finally getting vertical tabs
item.description: Google Chrome's latest update brings vertical tabs and a cleaner Reading Mode to help manage cluttered browsing.

item.title: Chrome finally adds support for vertical tabs.
item.description: Google has started rolling out a small but significant update to Chrome on desktop. Starting today, users will begin seeing an option to organize their tabs vertically. To use the new feature, right click on any Chrome window and select "Show Tabs Vertically." Google is late to the game here. Before today, every other major browser but Chrome offered support for vertical tabs — though the quality of implementation varies widely. Firefox, for instance, has supported vertical tabs since its 136 update in March of last year, and in my experience, has one of the best interfaces for managing dozens...

item.title: '5 strokes of the cane': Inside the massive scam compound that was bombed to end its reign of terror
item.description: A bombed casino complex near the Cambodia–Thailand border reveals how modern scam factories mimic official institutions to deceive victims.

item.title: Delta Becomes Third Airline to Hike Bag Fees as the Iran War Makes Jet Fuel More Expensive
item.description: Amazon and USPS are adding fuel surcharges this month.

item.title: 'Verify before you act': security expert reveals the simple steps you can take to stay safe from deepfakes
item.description: There are simple steps everyone can take to identify a fake video - and most include pixel hunting.

item.title: Binge is a movie tracking app that warns you of jump scares in real time
item.description: The app uses iPhone Live Activities to alert you when scary scenes are about to happen, while also tracking what to watch and where to stream it.

item.title: Uber is the latest to be won over by Amazon’s AI chips
item.description: Uber is expanding its AWS contract to run more of its ride-sharing features on Amazon's chips. This is a thumb-of-the nose at Oracle and Google.

item.title: Sit-ups wrecking your back? The 'body saw' is not only safer, but also activates more muscle, researchers say
item.description: The research-backed 'body saw' exercise should be your summer six-pack builder.

item.title: J’ai testé la tablette la plus fine du monde qui veut détrôner l’iPad Pro
item.description: Dans un marché des tablettes haut de gamme largement dominé par Apple et Samsung, Honor tente une percée audacieuse. La Honor MagicPad 4 n'est pas qu'une simple mise à jour de la MagicPad 2 ou 3, c’est la tablette la plus fine du monde !

item.title: HP OmniDesk Desktop blends woodgrain style with Core Ultra 7 performance for business use, and it's $770 off right now
item.description: HP OmniDesk Desktop features a 20-core Core Ultra 7-265 processor, 32GB of DDR5 memory, a fast 1TB SSD, and a woodgrain finish, and it's now $770 off.

item.title: Ça vaut quoi un 10/10 sur Frandroid ? La fin d’un drôle de tabou
item.description: Frandroid a toujours noté des produits sur de 0 à 10. Et justement, après avoir beaucoup réfléchi sur ce fameux 10/10, nous voulions clarifier ce que cela représente pour nous.

item.title: Pebblebee’s new personal tracker is an AirTag crossed with a safety siren and torch — but there’s more than meets the eye
item.description: The AirTag-rival packs three handy safety features, including a siren, strobe light, and alerts to selected contacts.

item.title: The Xbox Game Pass titles for April include Oblivion Remastered, Final Fantasy 4, and one of the best games of 2025
item.description: Xbox has unveiled the batch of Xbox Game Pass titles for the month of April, and it includes some absolute bangers like The Elder Scrolls 4: Oblivion Remastered, Day Z, and more.

item.title: Walmart's cheap new Google TV streaming stick has appeared — get 4K and Dolby Atmos for a very low price
item.description: Walmart's latest streamer isn't official but it's already in some stores and the full specs are now here

item.title: Suno and major music labels reportedly clash over AI music sharing
item.description: The AI-powered musicmaker Suno is struggling to reach licensing deals with Universal Music Group and Sony Music Entertainment. That's according to a report from the Financial Times, which says both sides can't agree on whether users should be able to share the AI-generated songs they create. "Universal wants AI-generated tracks to stay inside apps such […]...

item.title: A beloved fantasy RPG that takes more than 30 hours to beat is now available on your phone
item.description: Sea of Stars just launched for mobile with a special early discount.

item.title: Polaroid’s New Hi-Print for Phone Photos Doubles as a Freestanding Frame
item.description: You can now display your vintage-looking Polaroid photos in the same place you print them.

item.title: I can't think of anything that's off limits to them': FBI slams cybercriminals for attacking schools, hospitals, as crypto fraud soars
item.description: The FBI's new IC3 report dissects the state of ransomware, and discusses attacks on hospitals and critical infrastructure firms.

item.title: How to watch Sporting Lisbon vs Arsenal: live Champions League 2025/26 quarter-final first-leg
item.description: Here's how to watch Sporting Lisbon vs Arsenal in the first leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final at the José Alvalade Stadium.

item.title: Russia's major internet services instructed on how to detect VPNs — but there may be some workarounds
item.description: In his guidelines, Russia's Ministry of Digital Development highlighted some limitations in VPN detection, which could also help residents navigate the crackdown.

item.title: Researchers Turned Acid From Car Batteries Into Something Surprisingly Useful
item.description: This won’t fix the ongoing plastics problem, but it’s a good side plan.

item.title: La Xbox Series X est maintenant 100 € moins chère que la PS5 Slim grâce à cette offre
item.description: La Xbox Series X possède déjà de nombreux avantages sur la PlayStation 5 avec notamment la rétrocompatibilité sur de nombreuses générations ou encore le fameux Xbox Game Pass. Nouveau point maintenant pour Microsoft avec une réduction de 10 % chez Amazon et un prix 100 euros inférieur à son principal concurrent.

item.title: Anthropic ups compute deal with Google and Broadcom amid skyrocketing demand
item.description: Anthropic bulked up its compute deal with Google and Broadcom as the company has seen its run-rate revenue surge to $30 billion.

item.title: Do we still need a viewfinder? We asked you what you think about screen-only cameras — here's what you told us
item.description: After a wave of screen-only cameras and even the removal of viewfinders in recent updates of various models, I asked you if you'd buy a camera without a viewfinder. Here's what you said.

item.title: ‘Starfleet Academy’ Star Karim Diané Is Heading to IDW’s ‘Star Trek’ Pride Comic (Exclusive)
item.description: Diané, who plays queer Klingon cadet Jay-Den on 'Starfleet Academy,' will write one of the stories included in 'Star Trek Celebrations' this year.

item.title: I saw Sony’s True RGB TV tech in action, and it’s a serious step forward for TV picture quality
item.description: Sony has revealed more about its 2026 True RGB TV tech, which replaces the traditional backlight with individually controlled red, green, and blue LEDs for greater brightness, color accuracy, and control.

item.title: Satechi’s 3-in-1 travel stand now wirelessly charges your phone at 25W
item.description: The WPC introduced the Qi2.2 standard in April 2025, but the rollout of faster wireless chargers has been relatively slow. Following companies like Nomad, Belkin, and Kuxiu, Satechi has announced a new charger that supports Qi2.2. The 3-in-1 Foldable Wireless Charging Stand is an updated version of an existing product; the new incarnation boosts wireless […]...

item.title: How to watch Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich: Free Streams, TV Schedule and Preview for Champions League quarter-final first leg
item.description: Here's how to watch Real Madrid vs Bayern Munich in the first leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final at the iconic Santiago Bernebeu.

item.title: Sunnie is releasing ‘the teen mag we always wished existed’ with its first limited-edition zine
item.description: Actress Kiernan Shipka will be on the cover of the inaugural print issue, launching on April 7. Multimedia and experiential brand Sunnie is turning over a new page with the announcement of its first zine, launching in Target stores and online on April 7. The limited edition, 50-page print issue will feature actress Kiernan Shipka on the cover.

item.title: This CEO doubled luxury watch sales to women. Now she’s using that experience to reinvigorate legacy beauty brands
item.description: Ginny Wright, CEO of Orveon Global, is using her time leading Audemars Piguet Americas to inform her growth strategy for BareMinerals and Laura Mercier. Ginny Wright, CEO of beauty conglomerate Orveon Global—owner of BareMinerals and Laura Mercier—is no stranger to the beauty business. She spent much of her career rising through the ranks of L’Oreal, eventually becoming president of legacy skincare brand Kiehl’s. ...

item.title: Sony True RGB : la technologie de rétroéclairage Mini LED qui veut redéfinir les téléviseurs LCD haut de gamme
item.description: Sony lève officiellement le voile sur « True RGB », une technologie de rétroéclairage inédite destinée à équiper sa prochaine génération de téléviseurs BRAVIA. Fruit de deux décennies de recherche, cette approche promet un volume colorimétrique sans précédent pour un téléviseur grand public.

item.title: Glorious Artemis II photos show the Earth, moon, and stars like you’ve never seen them before
item.description: Your vacation pics will never top this. Yesterday, astronauts Reid Wiseman, Victor Glover, Christina Koch, and Jeremy Hansen became the first humans in over 50 years to see the far side of the moon.

item.title: How to watch Ligas - Stream Italian series online from anywhere
item.description: What happens when a controversial lawyer rewrites rules of justice with dangerous brilliance? Here's how to watch Avvocato Ligas from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Xbox Game Pass additions for April include Hades 2 and Call of Duty: Modern Warfare
item.description: As ever, Xbox is bringing a bunch of high-profile titles to Game Pass Ultimate and PC Game Pass this month, while adding several to the lower tiers of the service. There aren't too many surprises among this first wave of April newcomers, though. Many of these additions were previously confirmed, while EA Sports NHL 26 and Call of Duty: Modern Warfare (the remake) were always going to join Game Pass at some point. Still, there's plenty to dive into on the service this month. April 14 is a particularly eye-catching day, with both Hades 2 (which is debuting on Xbox Series X/S and PS5) and the lon...

item.title: The Moto Pad is Motorola’s first US-bound tablet in over a decade
item.description: Motorola announced two new devices today, including one of its first tablets to be available from a US carrier since Verizon's Xyboard tablets in 2011. The new Moto Pad is joined by the 2026 edition of the Moto G Stylus featuring an upgraded pen that responds to tilt and pressure changes in supported apps. The […]

item.title: Téléchargement illégal : la justice impose le blocage de neuf sites dont Zone-Téléchargement
item.description: Le tribunal judiciaire de Paris a rendu une décision importante concernant la lutte contre le piratage audiovisuel en France. Saisie par les principaux syndicats du cinéma et de l'édition vidéo, la justice ordonne aux fournisseurs d'accès à internet de rendre inaccessibles neuf plateformes de téléchargement illégal. Cette mesure concerne notamment le site Zone-Téléchargement et plusieurs autres sites de streaming....

item.title: Toyota built a fake dining room to teach execs about American size. It’s a lesson for every leader
item.description: Your customers may see things very differently from you. Why did Toyota‘s design firm build a model American dining room in Japan back in 1986, and then invite the company’s top brass to spend some time there? The easy answer, and the one you see in headlines and social media posts, is that they were trying to teach Toyota executives just how much bigger Americans are than Japanese people. While that’s certainly part of the explanation, it isn’t all of it. If you look at the whole picture, it can teach you a lot. That’s especially true if you hope to bring your company’s product to new markets...

item.title: Last-minute Easter deals are still live at Amazon UK — here are the 18 top tech offers I'd buy
item.description: Amazon launched a big tech sale over the Easter bank holiday weekend, but there's still time to score several of the best deals before they're gone — I've picked out the 18 top offers.

item.title: A Cure for Knee Arthritis? It May Be Closer Than You Think
item.description: Government-funded treatments that could tackle the root causes of knee osteoarthritis are now about to reach clinical trials.

item.title: Intel will help build Elon Musk’s Terafab AI chip factory
item.description: Elon Musk's Terafab AI chip project in Austin, Texas, is gaining a crucial new partner: Intel. On Tuesday, the American chipmaker announced it was signing on to help design and build the sprawling facility, which would supply AI chips to Musk's two companies, SpaceX (newly merged with xAI) and Tesla. Musk needs AI chips to […]

item.title: Emma Grede’s unfiltered take on modern leadership
item.description: You don’t need all the answers to be a leader—but you do need this mindset. Emma Grede explains why excellence is non-negotiable and why trying to please everyone will hold you back. This is the leadership advice nobody tells you. You don’t need all the answers to be a leader—but you do need this mindset. Emma Grede explains why excellence is non-negotiable and why trying to please everyone will hold you back. This is the leadership advice nobody tells you....

item.title: Save up to 20% vs. the other big guys when you switch to T-Mobile
item.description: T-Mobile users can save up to 20% vs. comparable plans at Verizon and AT&T.

item.title: 'Claude cannot be trusted to perform complex engineering tasks': AMD AI head slams Anthropic's coding tool after months of frustration
item.description: A February update to Claude Code has reduced performance, developers warn, but Anthropic says this was expected.

item.title: At $150 off, the new MacBook Air is now cheaper than last year’s model
item.description: If you were bummed that the new M5-powered MacBook Air cost $100 more than last year’s model, we’ve got some good news: it’s now cheaper than its predecessor. You can currently buy the latest 13-inch MacBook Air with an M5 chip, 16GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD on sale for $949.99 ($150 off) at […]

item.title: Chill out as temps rise with these fans from Shark, Dreame, and Dreo that are already on sale
item.description: Save over 40% on fans from Shark, Dreame, Dyson, Dreo, and more before summer heat.

item.title: Trump called the Artemis II crew. The silence went viral.
item.description: President Donald Trump congratulated NASA's Artemis II crew during a call from the White House, and the internet has thoughts.

item.title: Skip Apple's new AirPods Max 2 — Sony's award-winning WH-1000XM5 headphones are down to a near record-low price
item.description: There's no need to buy Apple's all-new AirPods Max 2 when Sony's award-winning WH-1000XM5 headphones are on sale for a new record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: How to watch S4: The Bob Lazar Story online and from anywhere
item.description: Here's how you can watch S4: The Bob Lazar Story online and from anywhere in the world. It's currently available to buy/rent on Prime Video.

item.title: Google Maps can now write captions for your photos using AI
item.description: Gemini can now create captions when users are looking to share a photo or video.

item.title: Get kids up and moving with the Fitbit Google Ace LTE for its lowest price yet
item.description: As of April 7, get the Fitbit Google Ace LTE for its lowest price yet.

item.title: Grab our favorite JBL Bluetooth speakers at their best prices ever
item.description: The JBL Flip 7 and Charge 6 are both on sale for their best prices ever, over 40% off, at Woot.

item.title: Meta Hopes a Hide-and-Seek App Will Convince You to Buy Its Smart Glasses
item.description: Or maybe plant recognition? How about plant recognition?

item.title: Windows 11 : Microsoft confirme un coup de pinceau sur l’interface au mois d’avril
item.description: Microsoft va enfin entreprendre la refonte esthétique de certains éléments d’interface de Windows 11. Plusieurs éléments clés comme les paramètres ou certaines boîtes de dialogue vont profiter d’un gros coup de pinceau dès la mise à jour de ce mois d’avril.

item.title: Le nouvel AirTag d’Apple se vend par quatre avec 20 euros de moins sur Amazon
item.description: À première vue, les AirTags 1 et 2 sont très similaires, mais si on zoome un peu, on peut trouver des différences notables, dont une remise de 20 euros pour le lot de quatre AirTags de deuxième génération chez Amazon.

item.title: How to watch the Majors on Sling TV
item.description: All the ways to watch the Majors on Sling TV from anywhere, with big things expected from Scottie Scheffler, Ludvig Aberg and Cameron Young in 2026.

item.title: The popular Ooni Karu outdoor pizza oven is now $100 more affordable
item.description: The Ooni Karu 12 outdoor pizza oven is on sale at Amazon for only $249. That's $100 or 39% off its list price.

item.title: Sony announces The Playerbase, 'a unique opportunity for PlayStation’s biggest fans' to be scanned into a PlayStation Studios game, starting with Gran Turismo 7
item.description: Sony has announced The Playerbase, a new initiative offering devoted PlayStation fans the chance to be scanned into a PlayStation Studios game.

item.title: Trump’s Congratulatory Call With the Artemis 2 Astronauts Was Painfully Awkward
item.description: Four astronauts flew around the Moon and all they got was this lousy phone call with the president.
